motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def maximumCount(self, nums: List[int], queries: List[List[int]]) -> List[int]:
    nums.sort()
    result = []
    for query in queries:
        idx = query[0]
        count = 0
        for i in range(len(nums)):
            if nums[i] % 2 == 1:
                count += 1
        result.append(count)
    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
